## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I used a Conventional Commit title
- [ ] I added a changeset when the change affects behavior or release notes
- [ ] I ran `pnpm check`
- [ ] I updated docs when the workflow or architecture changed
- [ ] I verified Prisma changes locally when schema or migrations changed
